name: design-skill
description: Experience design across websites, web apps, iOS, and Android — research, journeys, IA, interaction and state design, visual craft, content, accessibility, prototypes, design systems, critique, and frontend handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Experience design for websites, web apps, iOS, and Android
interface.longDescription: Design digital-product experiences end to end — UX research, user journeys, information architecture, interaction and state design, visual direction, typography, color, layout, motion, content design, accessibility, prototypes, design systems, design critique, and frontend handoff — across websites, web apps, iOS, and Android.
defaultPrompt: Use $design to art-direct a landing page for a developer tool and set its visual direction.
Use $design to design an accessible onboarding flow with every state for an iOS app.
Use $design to build an OKLCH color system and tokens for a dashboard in light and dark mode.
